Welcome to DBGT Network Version 5.0. Fully re-designed to give easier navigation and interface. The DBGT Network webmaster & staff are dedicated to offer you the best Dragonball content from all over the net. Many features of the site are always being improved to please the visitor. If you don't like something on this site don't hesitate to tell us what it is. This site has grown to be one of the most interactive sites on the net today. Enjoy your visit!
All news posts reported here is strictly for dbgt.com only. You may post any news on your site only with a source link back to ours. All news reported here is sourced if obtained elsewhere.

Crossfire awards are back..
 The crossfire awards are back and are looking for nominations for the following categories: Best Site, Best Webmaster, Best Webmistress, Best Information, Best Multimedia, Most Effort, Greatest Innovation, Most Effective Use of Graphics and Layout Design, Most Innovative and Effective Features, Best Programming and possibly a Best staff nomination. Why don't you email crossfire@animega.net and nominate dbgt for any of the following nominations. If you would like to check out their site go over to http://crossfire.animega.net.

 Posted: Friday, March 29, 2002 » GogetaXl
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cels Update again...
 Many more cels added for today's update including a few more new sections. Bulma, Gohan, Goku Jr., Goten, Gotenks, Kami, Krillin, Lunch, Nappa, Others, Pan, Piccolo, Red Ribbon Army, Supreme Kai, Tapion, Tien, Trunks, Turles, Vegeta, Videl, Yamcha have all been updated with new cels. The new sections added are Maron, Master Roshi, Nameks, Ran Fan, Yajirobe. Remember many more to come...

 Posted: Wednesday, March 27, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Changes yet again...
 Significant changes will be occurring with the site. Mainly to make the site even easier to navigate(no not a new layout) as well as to reduce bandwidth. Most sections will be revised, some will remain the same, others will change drastically while others will just disappear(rarely). Don't get scared if you can't find a certain section, chances are its been moved to a more appropiate category. Nonetheless, updates will continue. As for the 'Classified' section some people have been telling me about, it's still in construction.

 Posted: Friday, March 22, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Chat with Chris Sabat..
 It's a little late but here it is, "Monday, March 25, Chris Sabat, the voice of Dragon Ball Zs Vegeta and Piccolo and Yu Yu Hakushos Kuwabara, will be chatting with fans in the Official FUNimation Chat World. Sabat is also the voice director for Dragon Ball Z and Blue Gender. The chat will kick off at 7:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and 4:00 p.m. Pacific Standard Time. This is your chance to talk live with one todays hottest voice actors. Make sure you log on as Chris answers your questions."

 Register - Post Comments (9)
 Posted: Thursday, March 21, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GameZilla..Anime Gods..!?!?!?!
 I was talking to GameZilla earlier and he is thinking about making another website...or maybe AG..I'm not totally sure..best of luck to GameZilla with this "new" website..im not sure if he wanted me to post this but it won't hurt him and i dont think he'll really care...lol..I think this is important news to post since AG was once one of this sites affiliates...

Source: Otaku Legacy

 Register - Post Comments (0)
 Posted: Wednesday, March 20, 2002 » Sarugbyxl
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cel Update...
 Many more cels added for today's update including a new section. Android 17, Android 18, Androids, Bardock, Bojack's Team, Broli, Bulma, Cell, ChiChi, Dende, Dragons, Frieza, Frieza's Henchmen, Ginyu Force, Gogeta, and Vegetto have all been updated with new cels. The new section added is 'Bra'(Vegeta's Daughter GT). Remember many more to come...

 Posted: Wednesday, March 20, 2002 » fRaNk
